title: Ops Canon
sources: README.md: ROM Awakening and RAG infrastructure requirements
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District D
database.sql: Memo and user table schemas for local storage
forom-config.ts: Category D (Opérations) and Action 8 (Savoir) labels
App.tsx: Tech stack and quest reward implementation
resume: The quest 'Ops Canon' (D8) represents the operational apex of District D, positioned at the intersection of Opérations and the 'Savoir' action (8) on the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. In the architectural framework of a Forom node, the Savoir tag is reserved for 'Canon RAG Data'—the highest tier of archived knowledge designed for direct ingestion by the future local AI assistant, ROM. During Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), this quest moves beyond mere feedback or temporary guides to establish the definitive, immutable version of the node's operational protocols. To fulfill the mission of 'Saving human communities and long-term memory,' a community must have a flawless, machine-readable record of its internal mechanics. Technically, the 'Ops Canon' is stored as a foundational memo in the local PostgreSQL database, indexed under Category D and Question 8. This ensures that the 'Deep Lore' of the node's operational excellence is hosted on sovereign hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, rather than being exploited by centralized cloud platforms. The software environment, utilizing a high-performance stack of React 19 and Vite 7, renders this canonized data within a spatial 5x5 viewport, allowing the 9 Super-Moderators and the growing user base to access the 'source of truth' with absolute clarity. Economically, successfully contributing to the D8 quest rewards the participant with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP in V1, facilitating the redistribution of purchasing power within the node. This internal economy, kickstarted by the 500 PX initial treasury of the Super-Mods, incentivizes the 'Creator' role (Yellow alignment) to produce the high-quality documentation necessary for Phase 3. This archived record is particularly vital for pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs; it ensures that the technical and organizational 'DNA' of the club survives even after the founding members graduate. Once the community triggers the Awakening ritual in Phase 3, ROM will ingest this D8 memo to provide intelligent, context-aware operational support to all 1209 potential users. By establishing the operational canon at coordinate D8, the community transforms daily tasks into a permanent, searchable, and AI-ready asset. This entry secures the structural integrity of the forom for the decade ahead. It is the definitive manual for survival in the matrix. Every procedure is now part of our eternal memory. This canonization process is the final safeguard against organizational entropy and data decay within our sovereign digital environment, ensuring that each member remains fully aligned with the collective mission. Finalized.
summary: This quest establishes the canonized operational manual at coordinate D8, providing the 'Canon RAG Data' required for the community's future AI assistant to manage node operations.
